validated_commands.format: .venv/bin/ruff check src/ tests/ --fix && .venv/bin/ruff format src/ tests/
validated_commands.lint_check: .venv/bin/ruff check src/ tests/ && .venv/bin/ruff format --check src/ tests/
validated_commands.notes: uv not on PATH - use python3.12 -m uv with --python /usr/bin/python3.12 to avoid PyPy. Baseline 2026-05-05: 7 failed (policy_status ANSI), 7519 passed. Marketplace tests now pass.

coverage_baseline.notes: policy_status ANSI failures: Rich unicode box-drawing chars vs ASCII expectation. Pre-existing, PR #1029 closed by maintainer. runtime_factory: fixed (4 tests now skip when LLM not installed).

ansi_note: Rich outputs ANSI codes (italic, bold) even with NO_COLOR=1. Use regex r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*[A-Za-z]' to strip before text assertions.
maintainer_preferences: PRs #1029 (ANSI fix) and #1059 (uninstall engine tests) were closed without merging on 2026-05-03. Be more selective about submitting PRs.

testing_backlog.notes: Large complex file ~2804 lines. Core install logic. High risk. Deferred.
7 tests failing: policy_status uses Rich unicode but test expects ASCII. PR #1029 closed by maintainer - do not retry.

completed_work.description: Task3: Fixed 4 CI failures in test_runtime_factory.py - added skip markers for LLM-dependent tests. Task7: Updated monthly issue #1101.
Task4: No open TI PRs. Task2: 106 test failures observed (marketplace drift, ANSI, runtime, orphan). Task7: Updated monthly issue #1101.
Task3: Fix logic-replay anti-pattern in TestExplicitTargetDirCreation (#768). Task5: Commented on #768. Task7: Updated monthly issue #1101.
Task3: +7 tests for view command error paths. Task7: new 2026-05 monthly issue created.
